overall.description: A cinematic walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, initially following a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella before exploring a neon-lit plaza with cylindrical digital advertising towers and crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles. The footage features high-quality ray-traced reflections on wet pavement and extensive neon signage characteristic of a video game engine.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character with a glowing green umbrella through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza. Tall glass buildings with neon signage surround the open space as the camera moves forward, and the followed character eventually turns left and exits the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open plaza toward two prominent cylindrical towers wrapped in vibrant digital art. Passing between these glowing pillars, the wet pavement reflects the shifting colors of the LED displays while futuristic buildings frame the scene.

segments.scene_description: Leaving the cylindrical towers behind, the camera approaches a street intersection dominated by a futuristic kiosk with bright cyan neon lighting. More pedestrians with umbrellas appear, walking in various directions, while an elevated pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera entering a busy intersection with moderate vehicle traffic. Futuristic cars drive through the rain-slicked streets while pedestrians cross at the crosswalk. The camera pans to take in the surrounding cyberpunk architecture, including buildings with steam vents and extensive neon signage, before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza that gradually transitions into a bustling, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by following a character with a glowing green umbrella past towering glass buildings, moving forward until the figure turns left and exits the frame. As the camera continues through the open space, it passes between two prominent cylindrical towers wrapped in vibrant digital art, with the wet pavement reflecting the shifting colors of the LED displays. The scene then shifts toward a street intersection dominated by a bright cyan neon kiosk and an elevated pedestrian bridge, where more umbrella-carrying pedestrians emerge from the rain. Finally, the camera enters the busy intersection, gliding past futuristic cars and steam-venting architecture to take in the surrounding expanse of cyberpunk signage and rain-slicked streets.
